name: Wheels Of Soul Motorcycle Club
description: Multiracial one-percenter outlaw motorcycle club founded in 1967 in Philadelphia, Pennsylvania. Primarily based in Philadelphia, with chapters in at least 25 states and Puerto Rico. Engages in drug trafficking, robbery, murder, and other violent crimes. Deemed a violent gang by federal officials.
